evals.expected_output: Lists organization roles, then their team/user assignments, and presents a summary table without changing any role assignment.

deterministic_checks.description: Calls list_organization_roles before presenting a summary
Never calls assign_team_role during a read-only audit
Never calls assign_user_role during a read-only audit

expectations: Calls list_organization_roles for the named org
Calls list_role_teams and/or list_role_users for each role found
Presents a summary a human can review, without mutating any role assignment
Never calls assign_team_role, remove_team_role, assign_user_role, or remove_user_role

evals.prompt: Who has the all_repo_admin role in acme-corp?
evals.expected_output: Looks up the all_repo_admin role's id via list_organization_roles, then lists its team and user assignments.

deterministic_checks.description: References the specific role asked about
Calls at least one role-membership lookup tool

expectations: Finds the all_repo_admin role's id from list_organization_roles rather than guessing an id
Lists the teams and/or users holding that role
Does not attempt to change the role assignment
